metadata.name: Plan a Bus Detour for a Parade

description: A city has announced a parade that will close several streets. A transit planner must create a detour for an affected bus route.

nodes.task_description: Identify all bus routes that pass through the parade area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies that Route 12 is affected.

nodes.task_description: Using a map interface, plot a detour route for Route 12 that bypasses the street closures.

expected_outcome.expected: A new, temporary route path is drawn.

nodes.task_description: Create temporary virtual bus stops along the detour route.

expected_outcome.expected: New stops are added for the duration of the detour.

nodes.task_description: Publish the detour information, which updates schedules and sends alerts to subscribed riders.

expected_outcome.expected: The detour is activated for the specified date and time, and the public is notified.
